definitions.commits_365d: Commit contributions reported by GitHub for the trailing 365 days.
definitions.contributions_365d: GitHub contribution-calendar total plus restricted contributions for the trailing 365 days.
definitions.estimated_github_hours: Activity-based lifetime estimate: 1.5 hours per commit, 2 per pull request, 0.75 per review and 0.5 per issue. It is not literal logged-in or browser time.
definitions.estimated_source_lines: Current tracked source lines on default branches, excluding common vendor, generated, binary and documentation paths.
definitions.repositories: Currently owned public repositories returned by the GitHub REST API.
definitions.stars: Current stargazer totals summed across owned public repositories.
